title: pyrrocoma howellii
intro: Pyrrocoma howellii, also known as Howell's pyrrocoma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the southwestern United States. The medicinal properties of Pyrrocoma howellii are attributed to its roots, which contain sesquiterpene lactones, a type of compound with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Pyrrocoma howellii is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
